summary: Groove‑heavy show highlighted by a superb 'When I Paint My Masterpiece' and solid audio despite an unknown source type
review: Both reviewers rave about the concert’s nonstop groove, especially noting Jerry’s flawless playing at altitude and the infectious rendition of "When I Paint My Masterpiece." No technical flaws are mentioned, implying a clean listening experience even though the exact recording source isn’t identified. Overall the performance is described as unforgettable and goose‑bumps‑inducing.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 5‑star reviews praise the musical performance and mention no audio problems, indicating an excellent show with at least good recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on any sound issues; no specific details about source or mix were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as grooving from beginning to end with a particularly strong vibe on the Sunday afternoon show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Handled high altitude great and delivered flawless guitar work.
